info.description: API for managing the tutoring system (CRM)
info.title: SEZ Tutoring Platform API

post.summary: Complete profile registration for OAuth users

get.summary: Get list of tutors
Get tutor profile by ID

parameters.description: Filter by student name or surname
parameters.name: name

get.summary: Get list of students for current tutor
Get student by ID

200.description: List of students by course retrieved successfully

get.summary: Get list of students enrolled on the course
Get list of all available subjects

delete.description: Deletion will be blocked if any courses are linked to this subject

400.description: Cannot delete subject linked to existing courses

parameters.description: Filter by tutor first or last name
parameters.name: tutorName

parameters.description: If true, returns only courses where the current student is not enrolled
parameters.name: excludeEnrolled

parameters.description: Sorting criteria. Multiple values allowed (e.g., sortBy=rating_desc&sortBy=price_asc)
parameters.name: sortBy

get.summary: Search available courses with filters for students
Get personal courses for tutor

delete.description: Deletion will be blocked if active enrollments exist

400.description: Cannot delete course with active students

get.summary: Get course details by ID

parameters.description: Filter by student name or surname
parameters.name: studentName

parameters.description: Filter by tutor name or surname
parameters.name: tutorName

get.summary: Get list of enrollments for student or tutor

delete.description: Deletes enrollment and associated planned lessons

get.summary: Get full enrollment details including student and course objects

parameters.description: Filter by student name or surname
parameters.name: studentName

get.summary: Get list of active enrollments for current student

delete.description: Видаляє запис на навчання за ID курсу.  ID поточного студента визначається автоматично сервером через токен авторизації.

parameters.description: ID курсу, запис на який потрібно видалити
parameters.name: courseId

404.description: Enrollment not found for this course and current student

get.summary: Get lessons for current user (calendar view)

delete.description: Removes a scheduled lesson from the system.

403.description: Forbidden - only tutors can delete lessons

patch.summary: Update lesson details (time, status, or meeting link)

get.summary: Get full lesson details including tutor, student and course info

parameters.description: Sort by date. True for newest first, False for oldest first.
parameters.name: dateDescending

get.summary: Get list of assignments for the current student

parameters.description: Sort by date. True for newest first, False for oldest first.
parameters.name: dateDescending

200.description: List of assignments for the tutor

get.summary: Get list of assignments managed by the tutor

post.summary: Create a new assignment for a specific lesson
Mark assignment as completed by student

404.description: Assignment not found for this lesson

get.summary: Get assignment details for a specific lesson
Download attachment content

schema.description: Sort reviews by rating in descending order

get.summary: Get list of reviews for a specific tutor

post.summary: Create a new review for a tutor

get.summary: Get current student's review for a specific tutor

patch.summary: Update existing review rating and comment

get.summary: Get only informational notifications (announcements)
Get only action requests

post.summary: Accept or Decline an action request

UpdateTutorDto.description: Fields that can be updated in tutor profile

name.description: Name of the subject (e.g., Mathematics, English)

hourlyRate.description: Hourly rate for tutoring services. Must be at least 1.0
Hourly rate for tutoring services. Must be at least 1.0

status.description: Use ACTIVE to confirm the enrollment request

startTime.description: Час початку уроку. Повинен бути у майбутньому.

endTime.description: Час закінчення уроку. Повинен бути після часу початку.

price.description: Ціна за урок. Не може бути від’ємною.

UpdateLessonDto.description: Поля для часткового оновлення уроку. При зміні часу проводиться перевірка на наявність конфліктів у розкладі.

tutorName.description: Name of the tutor being reviewed

tutorSurname.description: Surname of the tutor being reviewed

studentName.description: Name of the student who wrote the review

studentSurname.description: Surname of the student who wrote the review
